'''1219''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] around the year [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He<ref name="Revolt of the Battle Droids /> was present aboard the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Decimator (Star Destroyer)|''Decimator'']] when it was attacked by [[12-4C-41]].<ref name="Revolt of the Battle Droids />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The illustration used to represent 1219 was a modified version of the image of [[Davin Felth/Legends|Davin Felth]] from ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' {{1st}}
